summary_one_line: Input must carry a valid GDEF table (FOURCC 'GDEF' at offset 0x0c) so hb_ot_layout_has_glyph_classes returns true and the false branch is taken.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font blob whose table directory contains the 4-byte tag 'GDEF' (47 44 45 46) at offset 0x0c, parsed into a GDEF table that defines glyph classes, so hb_ot_layout_has_glyph_classes(face) is true and the line-137 condition is false.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed places the literal bytes 47 44 45 46 ('GDEF') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f with a valid TrueType header (00 01 00 00) at the start, satisfying the table-directory lookup so the glyph-class probe succeeds and the false branch executes.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry arbitrary bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (no 'GDEF' tag) and no valid table directory, so the face has no glyph classes; the true branch (line 138, plan.fallback_glyph_classes = true) is taken instead and hb_synthesize_glyph_classes runs.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the 4-byte FOURCC comparison against 'GDEF' during table-directory parsing, record both operands in CmpLogObserver, and I2SRandReplace substitutes the expected 'GDEF' tag into the input at the matching offset; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot synthesize the exact 4-byte magic, so they never resolve the false branch.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a check on whether the face already has glyph classes (GDEF), gating fallback class synthesis.
Both decisive pairs differ only by the I2S technique and the winner resolves the branch in all 10 trials while the loser is blocked in all 10.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile, again an I2S delta.
Winner-resolving seeds contain the literal 'GDEF' FOURCC at offset 0x0c with a TrueType header at the start.
At offsets 0x0c-0x0f the winner set is fully concentrated on the bytes spelling 'GDEF' while losers diverge entirely.
Loser-blocking seeds take the true branch and have no GDEF table directory.
When the loser takes the true branch the fallback class-synthesis function runs 381 times, but never in the winner set.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CMP buffer and substitutes the other operand at offsets where the input matches one operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so the I2S delta is the only technique distinguishing the vpc winner from the vp loser.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5694 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 60bd962a3dc60d31` and observed the I2S-floor signal: 2 ancestor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 4 and 5 of the chain, characteristic of unwrapped I2SRandReplace finds in cmplog under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on hb_ot_layout_has_glyph_classes where cmplog resolves the false branch as fast as naive even when the 'GDEF' FOURCC is removed from the seed corpus and table directory, showing the 4-byte tag match is not the I2S-solved gate.

weakest_evidence_point: The branch resolution depends on a full valid GDEF table parse (header + class definitions), not merely the 'GDEF' tag bytes; I2S supplies the tag but downstream structural validity may be the true determinant.
